name: Hot Mocha Coffee Mix
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups Instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
3. For each serving, add 2 Tablespoons of the mix into a cup.
4. Add 1 cup of boiling water to the cup and stir well.
